name: kimi-status-pro
description: Monitor Kimi Code quota usage in real-time

kimiStatusPro.displayMode.description: Status bar display mode. percent: show percentage with mini bar. absolute: show used/limit count.

kimiStatusPro.statusBar.alignment.description: Status bar alignment. left: aligned to the left side of the status bar. right: aligned to the right side.

kimiStatusPro.updateAnimationDurationMs.description: Duration of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 500–10000. When new data arrives during animation, the timer resets.

kimiStatusPro.updateAnimationIntervalMs.description: Frame interval of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 100–2000. Controls how fast the moon phases cycle.

kimiStatusPro.statusBar.utilizationColor.description: Status bar text color when utilization is below 20%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 20%–40%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 40%–60%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 60%–80%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 80% or above. Hex color string.

kimiStatusPro.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: API refresh interval in seconds. Range: 30–∞. Long tick fetches quota from API.

kimiStatusPro.shortRefreshIntervalSecond.description: Local estimation refresh interval in seconds. Range: 1–60. Short tick reads local JSONL and estimates usage without API call.

kimiStatusPro.dataRetentionDays.description: Local usage data retention period in days. Range: 30–3650. Older entries are discarded during scan.

kimiStatusPro.weeklyBudget.description: Weekly budget in RMB. 0 means disabled. When cost7d exceeds this value, a warning is shown.

kimiStatusPro.heatmapDays.description: Number of days to show in the usage history heatmap.

kimiStatusPro.heatmapCycles5h.description: Number of 5h cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

kimiStatusPro.heatmapCycles7d.description: Number of 7d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

kimiStatusPro.heatmapCycles30d.description: Number of 30d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

kimiStatusPro.costCurveMaxPoints.description: Maximum number of data points for the cost curve. Range: 200–20000.

kimiStatusPro.chartHeightRatio.description: Height ratio for dashboard charts (canvas height = width * ratio).

kimiStatusPro.pricing.models.kimi26.inpu.description: Kimi-2.6 input token price per million (RMB).

kimiStatusPro.pricing.models.kimi26.outp.description: Kimi-2.6 output token price per million (RMB).

kimiStatusPro.pricing.models.kimi26.cach.description: Kimi-2.6 cache-read token price per million (RMB).
Kimi-2.6 cache-write token price per million (RMB).

kimiStatusPro.pricing.officialUrl.description: Official pricing page URL shown in Dashboard.

kimiStatusPro.pricing.officialDate.description: Pricing publish date displayed next to the official pricing link (YYYY-MM-DD).

kimiStatusPro.defaultModelName.description: Default model name displayed when usage entry has no model information.

kimiStatusPro._pauseSignal.description: Internal: pause state broadcast signal (timestamp). Do not modify manually.
